title: Cyber Security and Resilience Bill: policy statement
body: "The Cyber Security and Resilience Policy Statement sets out the policy measures to be included in the forthcoming Cyber Security and Resilience Bill, which will be introduced to Parliament later this year.  This policy statement is also being laid before Parliament on 1 April 2025. The Bill will be introduced to Parliament in the current Parliamentary session.   Read the press notice.  Read the ministerial statement on the bill.   For more information and background, please see the Cyber Security and Resilience Bill document collection.  Alternative version in Welsh   Mae fersiwn amgen o’r mesurau hyn ar gael yn Gymraeg An alternative version of these measures is available in Welsh  "
